title: TychoTyke Construction and Rescue Tools Truck with Light and Sound Yellow
description:
Don't let your house get cluttered with cars, trucks and other children toys all over the place. This fantastic carrier is neatly designed with holder snap-close lids on both sides of the truck to display the tools and other toys neatly. It has space for additional toy cars inside the truck. Big carrier truck is not only a transport car toy but also a good organizer for your mini cars and tool toys. This truck will give you hours of fun and quality time with your little one. The sturdy carrying handle makes it easy to take along around the house or when you are on the go, convenient to carry. This set is ideal for educational, school and family, science project, birthday parties, collections, party favors, and so on

Don't let your house get cluttered with cars, trucks and other children toys all over the place. Big carrier truck is not only a transport car toy but also a good organizer for your mini cars and tool toys.

This truck will give you hours of fun and quality time with your little one. The sturdy carrying handle makes it easy to take along around the house or when you are on the go, convenient to carry.

Key Features

  • TRANSPORT TRUCK - Construction and Rescue Tools Truck with Light and Sound Yellow
  • EASY TO CARRY - The Carrying Handle On Top Makes It Easy To Take Along, Around, Around the House or When You Are On The Go. Designed With High Quality and Durable Materials. Tested and proven to be safe and strong for your children.
  • LIGHTS - The Truck Lights Up Making it Easy to Navigate Your Truck In the Dark.
  • PLAYS SOUNDS - The Truck Has Plenty of Sounds and Music Guaranteed To Give You Hours Upon Hours of Fun.
  • THE MOST AMAZING GIFT - It is the best toy truck for children ever been on any marketplace. Terrific Gift for Birthdays and Holidays, for your young children. They will enjoy hours of play.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: CRTY

  • Size: 15 in

This set is ideal for educational, school and family, science project, birthday parties, collections, party favors, and so on. Best Christmas Gift for boys & girls, inspire imaginations, and improve learning interest.

Recomened for Ages 3+ and Up Includes 3 x 1.5 "LR44" Size Batteries

WARNING: Button/coin batteries can cause severe injuries or even death when swallowed. Keep batteries out of reach of children. If you suspect a child has swallowed or inserted a button/coin battery, seek medical attention immediately.
